{{Infobox location
| name = Emperor's personal armory
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Emperor's personal armory]] is a small stone building with a [[steel]] door located within the [[Imperial Palace]].}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
